STEP 993 — Self-Reference Cluster Lean 4 Scaffolding (Rei-AIOS)
  ================================================================

  Falsifiable test of the Tier 3 claude-discovery hypothesis:
    "Löb's theorem, reflective PL (3-Lisp), and acausal decision theory
    share a common Lean 4 encoding via a fixed-point operator on a
    self-description type."

  Approach: provide an abstract structure `SelfRef` and attempt to give
  three instantiations. The typing-isomorphism hypothesis is CONFIRMED
  if all three instantiations type-check; FALSIFIED (or refined) if
  any instance requires cha
